description: Detects repeated Bedrock prompt prefixes or static context that should be evaluated for prompt caching.

severity_rules.name: missing_prompt_cache_for_repeated_context
severity_rules.condition: repeated_prefix_tokens >= 1024 AND repeated_requests_per_day >= 100 AND cache_read_tokens == 0 AND model_supports_prompt_cache == true
severity_rules.description: Repeated static prompt context is being charged as normal input tokens. Add cache points or prompt caching where the model supports it.

validation_before_change: Confirm repeated prefix is stable and does not include user secrets or volatile policy text.
Confirm model, region, and SDK path support prompt caching.
Measure cache read tokens and cache write tokens after rollout.
